{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aether scanners
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Most ships do not have decent [[Aether scanners]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Pilot]] has a unique [[Aethertech]] scanner.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
